description: CompositionBlack cap engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has velcro closure at the back for a customised fit, eyelets, manchester united branding on the crown and 'Man Utd' text at the velcro closureWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) FitComfortWash careHand wash in warm water at 40 degreesDo not wring, bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryAll Manchester United fans will love this nike cap with the football club's logo on its crown. The fabric ensures zero distractions and helps keep out the sun. Wear this to flaunt your support for your favourite team!
